description: Advanced app features for QuantTube, QuantNeon, QuantEdits, QuantMax, and QuantAI - including video analytics, chapters, memberships, content ID, clips; reels remix, fundraisers, branded content, professional dashboard; AI background replacement, style transfer, motion tracking, batch editing; duets, live gifts, dating verification, sound library; agents framework, knowledge base, fine-tuning, AI marketplace, research mode
steps: Create apps/quantube/api/services/video-analytics-service.ts - VideoAnalytics: getRetentionGraph(), getTrafficSources(), getDemographics(), getRevenueMetrics(), getWatchTime()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/chapters-service.ts - ChaptersService: createChapter(), autoGenerate(), reorder(), getTimestamps(), detectScenes(), AIAutoChapter()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/membership-service.ts - MembershipService: createTier(), subscribe(), getPerks(), addBadge(), getMembers(), processRenewal()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/content-id-service.ts - ContentIDService: fingerprint(), match(), claimContent(), resolveDispute(), getMatchHistory(), monetize()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/clips-service.ts - ClipsService: createClip(), shareClip(), getClipViews(), trendingClips(), clipFromTimestamp()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/community-posts-service.ts - CommunityPosts: createPost(), createPoll(), respondToPoll(), getEngagement(), pinPost()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/watch-party-service.ts - WatchParty: create(), join(), syncPlayback(), chat(), invite(), getActive(), endParty()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/premiere-service.ts - PremiereService: schedule(), createCountdown(), goLive(), enableChat(), getWaitingRoom()
Create apps/quantube/api/services/super-thanks-service.ts - SuperThanks: tip(), getLeaderboard(), createAnimation(), setMinimum(), getEarnings()
Create apps/quantube/api/controllers/video-analytics-controller.ts - Analytics endpoints
Create apps/quantube/api/controllers/membership-controller.ts - Membership endpoints
Create apps/quantube/api/controllers/content-id-controller.ts - Content ID endpoints
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/video-analytics.ts - Analytics routes
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/memberships.ts - Membership routes
Create apps/quantube/api/routes/content-id.ts - Content ID routes
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/reels-remix-service.ts - ReelsRemix: createRemix(), duetLayout(), addOwnVideo(), setCredits(), getRemixes()
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/fundraiser-service.ts - FundraiserService: create(), donate(), getProgress(), endFundraiser(), shareToFeed(), withdraw()
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/professional-dashboard-service.ts - ProfDashboard: getInsights(), getReach(), getFollowerDemographics(), getContentPerformance()
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/branded-content-service.ts - BrandedContent: addPartnerLabel(), requestApproval(), createAd(), getDisclosure(), trackPerformance()
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/accessibility-service.ts - AccessibilityService: addAltText(), autoGenerateAlt(), getSensitivityScreen(), setContentWarning()
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/follower-management-service.ts - FollowerMgmt: removeFollower(), restrictUser(), blockUser(), getActivityStatus(), setVanishMode()
Create apps/quantneon/api/services/pinned-posts-service.ts - PinnedPosts: pin(), unpin(), reorder(), getMaxPins(), validateEligibility()
Create apps/quantneon/api/controllers/reels-remix-controller.ts - Remix endpoints
Create apps/quantneon/api/controllers/fundraiser-controller.ts - Fundraiser endpoints
Create apps/quantneon/api/controllers/professional-controller.ts - Professional dashboard endpoints
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/reels-remix.ts - Remix routes
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/fundraiser.ts - Fundraiser routes
Create apps/quantneon/api/routes/professional.ts - Professional routes
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/ai-background-service.ts - AIBackground: replace(), detect(), segment(), selectReplacement(), blendEdges(), previewResult()
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/style-transfer-service.ts - StyleTransfer: applyStyle(), listStyles(), customStyle(), intensityControl(), previewTransfer()
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/motion-tracking-service.ts - MotionTracking: trackObject(), attachElement(), setKeyframes(), smoothPath(), previewTracking()
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/beat-sync-service.ts - BeatSync: detectBeats(), autoSyncCuts(), setTempo(), adjustTiming(), previewSync()
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/batch-editing-service.ts - BatchEditing: createBatch(), applyToAll(), setPreset(), processQueue(), getProgress()
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/plugin-system-service.ts - PluginSystem: loadPlugin(), unloadPlugin(), listPlugins(), marketplace(), validatePlugin(), sandboxExec()
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/team-workspace-service.ts - TeamWorkspace: create(), invite(), setPermissions(), getActivity(), shareProject(), reviewEdit()
Create apps/quantedits/api/controllers/ai-editing-controller.ts - AI editing endpoints
Create apps/quantedits/api/controllers/plugins-controller.ts - Plugin system endpoints
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/ai-editing.ts - AI editing routes
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/plugins.ts - Plugin routes
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/duet-stitch-service.ts - DuetStitch: createDuet(), createStitch(), setLayout(), trimSource(), publish(), getReactions()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/live-gifts-service.ts - LiveGifts: sendGift(), convertCurrency(), getLeaderboard(), cashOut(), setMinCashout(), getAnimations()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/dating-verification-service.ts - DatingVerification: submitVideo(), verifyIdentity(), scoreTrust(), detectDeepfake(), getBadge()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/dating-ai-service.ts - DatingAI: suggestIcebreaker(), analyzeCompatibility(), generateOpener(), coachConversation(), detectRedFlags()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/sound-library-service.ts - SoundLibrary: search(), getTrending(), addToFavorites(), useInVideo(), getUsageCount(), createOriginal()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/video-effects-service.ts - VideoEffects: timeWarp(), beautyMode(), clone(), greenScreen(), slowMotion(), applyFilter()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/creator-analytics-service.ts - CreatorAnalytics: followerGrowth(), engagementRate(), bestPostingTimes(), contentMix(), revenueReport()
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/premium-features-service.ts - PremiumFeatures: subscribe(), unlimitedLikes(), seeWhoLiked(), passport(), boost(), getPremiumStatus()
Create apps/quantmax/api/controllers/duet-controller.ts - Duet/Stitch endpoints
Create apps/quantmax/api/controllers/live-gifts-controller.ts - Live gifts endpoints
Create apps/quantmax/api/controllers/dating-controller.ts - Dating verification endpoints
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/duets.ts - Duet routes
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/live-gifts.ts - Live gifts routes
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/dating-premium.ts - Dating premium routes
Create apps/quantai/api/services/agents-service.ts - AgentsService: createAgent(), executeAction(), chainActions(), getAgentState(), pauseAgent(), scheduleAgent()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/knowledge-base-service.ts - KnowledgeBase: uploadDocument(), index(), query(), getRelevantContext(), deleteDocument(), getStats()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/fine-tuning-service.ts - FineTuning: createDataset(), startTraining(), getProgress(), evaluateModel(), deploy(), rollback()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/ai-marketplace-service.ts - AIMarketplace: listPersonas(), createPersona(), publishPersona(), rate(), purchase(), getEarnings()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/research-mode-service.ts - ResearchMode: search(), summarize(), cite(), factCheck(), synthesize(), exportReport()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/calendar-ai-service.ts - CalendarAI: autoSchedule(), prepMeeting(), suggestFollowUp(), findOptimalTime(), resolveConflicts()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/creative-mode-service.ts - CreativeMode: generateStory(), writePoem(), createScript(), composeLyrics(), brainstorm(), refine()
Create apps/quantai/api/services/math-reasoning-service.ts - MathReasoning: solve(), showSteps(), visualize(), checkWork(), explainConcept(), practiceProblems()
Create apps/quantai/api/controllers/agents-controller.ts - Agents endpoints
Create apps/quantai/api/controllers/knowledge-base-controller.ts - Knowledge base endpoints
Create apps/quantai/api/controllers/marketplace-controller.ts - AI marketplace endpoints

acceptance_criteria: QuantTube has 9 new services for video analytics, chapters, memberships, content ID, clips, community posts, watch party, premiere, super thanks
QuantNeon has 7 new services for reels remix, fundraisers, professional dashboard, branded content, accessibility, follower management, pinned posts
QuantEdits has 7 new services for AI background, style transfer, motion tracking, beat sync, batch editing, plugin system, team workspace
QuantMax has 8 new services for duets, live gifts, dating verification, dating AI, sound library, video effects, creator analytics, premium features
QuantAI has 8 new services for agents, knowledge base, fine-tuning, AI marketplace, research mode, calendar AI, creative mode, math reasoning
All services have full controllers and routes following existing patterns
Each file has 200-400 lines of complete business logic
verification: Run: node scripts/test.js - should pass with significantly increased file count
Verify new service files exist in each app's api/services/ directory
